rowSchema.derivedDefinitionId: Stable id for an ERB-only definition candidate.
rowSchema.sourceId: Original semantic id, such as mission:1 or main-menu:100.
rowSchema.runtimeOwner: Definitions owner that future implementation must consume.
rowSchema.statusForDefinitionCoverage: Definition coverage status to merge into definitions.json.
rowSchema.componentLabels: Sub-labels that split title, condition, calculation, effect, and text.
